name: Spicy Crab Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Maryland crabmeat, fresh or pasteurized
recipeInstructions:
1. Place water and chicken wings in a large pan.
2. Cover and simmer over low heat for at least one hour.
3. Add vegetables (celery and onion) and seasonings (seafood seasoning, salt, and lemon pepper).
4. Simmer, covered, over medium heat about 30 to 40 minutes or until vegetables are almost done.
5. Add crabmeat and simmer, covered, for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Serve hot. For a milder soup, decrease seafood seasoning as desired.
Yield: 8 servings at 153 calories per serving.
